The Problem

News today is noise.
We built the antidote.

Endless feeds engineered for outrage. Headlines stripped of context. Algorithms that trap you in ideological silos. You're consuming more than ever — understanding less. Chintan exists because news deserves thought, not just a scroll.

What Makes Chintan Different

Built for minds that refuse
to stop questioning.

01

The Other Side

Every major story comes with an alternative perspective. Not to confuse — but to complete your understanding. See how the same event looks through different lenses, ideologies, and lived experiences.

Perspective A"A landmark reform that could reshape India's economic trajectory for generations..."
Perspective B"Critics argue the move overlooks rural India and risks widening existing divides..."
02

Morning. Afternoon. Night.

News structured around your day, not a bottomless pit. Wake up to a crisp morning catchup. Get a midday deep-dive when you have focus. Wind down with an evening reflection. Your rhythm, your briefing.

Morning
Crisp catchup
to start your day
Afternoon
Deep-dive when
you have focus
Night
Reflect on
what mattered
03

Ask. Understand. Think.

Chintan's AI assistant lives inside every article. Ask questions, request context, explore implications — in plain language. Like a knowledgeable analyst by your side, ready to go deeper.

What does this policy mean for small businesses?
Chintan AI
The regulation primarily impacts firms with revenue above ₹50Cr. For smaller businesses, three key implications stand out...
And the rural impact?
Chintan AI
Rural economists have flagged concerns about
04

An Algorithm That Evolves With You

Most algorithms trap you in bubbles. Ours learns what you care about while deliberately expanding your worldview. It analyses your reading — then surfaces the perspectives you'd otherwise miss.

Without Chintan
Same sources. Same views.
With Chintan
Diverse. Expanded. Yours.
05

Polls & Community Pulse

Weigh in on the day's biggest questions. See where the community stands — and discover why people who disagree might have a point. Real-time polls embedded within every story.

Should India prioritise renewable energy over industrial growth?
Renewables first62%
Balanced approach24%
Industry first14%
2,847 readers voted
06

Engage. Discuss. Grow.

News is better when it's social. Comment, debate, and build a community that cares about understanding — not just reacting. Thoughtful discourse, not noise.

AP
Arjun P.
This perspective changes everything. The rural angle is critical and rarely covered.

07

Developing Stories, One Roof

When a story unfolds, don't chase fragments across ten sources. Chintan keeps every update, every twist under one thread — so you never miss a beat on what matters most.

Developing Story
2 min ago
Parliament session adjourned after opposition walkout over new amendment.
45 min ago
Finance Minister responds to criticism, cites revised GDP projections.
2 hours ago
Amendment tabled in Lok Sabha amid heated debate on fiscal impact.
Yesterday
Cabinet approves draft of economic reform bill.

How It Works

Three steps to a clearer worldview.

01
Tell us what matters
Choose your interests — politics, tech, culture, business, sports, global affairs. Chintan starts building your world from day one.
02
Receive curated intelligence
AI assembles your briefs with context, multiple perspectives, and the questions mainstream outlets won't ask.
03
Do Chintan
Engage with polls, explore The Other Side, challenge assumptions with AI. Over time, you become a sharper thinker.

The news isn't changing.
How you think about it can.

Join the waitlist. Be among the first to experience news built for thought, depth, and intention.
